{{Quote|That Bith keeps buying droids, and the Salvagers keep smashing them up.|[[Panar]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Bahima''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] bartender in the [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] during the [[Onderon Civil War]]. In [[3951 BBY]], he owned [[S-0D3-GE3]], and assisted [[Meetra Surik]] during her investigation of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sullio]]'s murder. According to some of his patrons, Bahima had an ever-growing problem with keeping his [[Droid/Legends|droids]] activated and on his property.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
If Surik has fallen far down the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], Bahima will mention that the Bith have excellent skin creams that can make Surik look like a [[Human/Legends|Human]] in their prime.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
